projectDescription: An AI-powered Mandarin conversation and pronunciation coaching app that uses the Gemini Live API for real-time dialogue, triple-layered subtitles (Hanzi, Pinyin, English), and instant pronunciation scoring.
keyFeatures: Real-time Mandarin conversation powered by Gemini Live API
Triple-layered subtitles: Hanzi, Pinyin, and English translation
Instant pronunciation scoring (0-100) with specific tonal feedback
Curated lesson library with structured roleplay scenarios
Adjustable speaking rates: Slow, Normal, and Fast
Full conversation history with Hanzi, Pinyin, and translation
publicApiSurface: ConversationTurn { id, role, text, pinyin?, translation?, timestamp }
Lesson { id, title, description, level, topic, scenario }
ConnectionState enum: DISCONNECTED | CONNECTING | CONNECTED | ERROR
Gemini tool: provide_pronunciation_feedback(userText, pinyin, score, feedback)
